mapper.select: SELECT memberid AS memberId, name AS name, birth_date AS birthDate, email AS email, phone AS phone, gender AS gender, community_company_name AS communityCompanyName FROM tbl_member WHERE memberid = #{memberId}

SELECT R.resume_id AS resumeId, R.photo_path AS photoPath, R.fk_region_code AS regionCode, R.fk_category_id AS categoryId, R.desired_salary AS desiredSalary, RG.region_name AS regionName, JC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_resume R LEFT JOIN tbl_region RG ON R.fk_region_code = RG.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON R.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE R.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND R.is_primary = 1 AND R.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET name = #{name}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, gender = #{gender}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberId}
UPDATE tbl_member SET password = #{encodedPassword}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND application_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND application_status = 0 AND process_status IN (0, 1, 3)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_offer_response R JOIN tbl_offer_submit S ON S.offer_submit_id = R.fk_offer_submit_id WHERE R.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND R.response_status = 0 AND (S.expire_at IS NULL OR S.expire_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_offer_response R JOIN tbl_offer_submit S ON S.offer_submit_id = R.fk_offer_submit_id WHERE R.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND R.response_status = 0 AND R.viewed_at IS NULL AND (S.expire_at IS NULL OR S.expire_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_job_application WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND application_status = 0 AND process_status = 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.application_id AS "id", P.title AS "postTitle", C.company_name AS "companyName", TO_CHAR(A.applied_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS "appliedAt", CASE A.process_status WHEN 0 THEN 'UNREAD' WHEN 1 THEN 'READ' WHEN 3 THEN 'UNDER_REVIEW' ELSE 'READ' END AS "status" FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting P ON A.fk_job_id = P.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON P.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE A.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND A.application_status = 0 ORDER BY A.applied_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT V.fk_job_id AS "id", P.title AS "title", C.company_name AS "companyName", CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) = TRUNC(V.viewed_at) AND FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24 * 60) < 1 THEN '방금 전' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) = TRUNC(V.viewed_at) AND FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24) < 1 THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24 * 60) || '분 전' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) = TRUNC(V.viewed_at) THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - V.viewed_at) * 24) || '시간 전' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(V.viewed_at) = 1 THEN '1일 전' ELSE FLOOR(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(V.viewed_at)) || '일 전' END AS "viewedAt", CASE WHEN P.deadline_type = 'always' THEN '상시채용' WHEN P.deadline_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN '마감' WHEN TRUNC(P.deadline_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'D-Day' ELSE 'D-' || (TRUNC(P.deadline_at) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) END AS "dDay" FROM tbl_viewed_posting V JOIN tbl_job_posting P ON V.fk_job_id = P.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON P.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE V.fk_memberid = #{memberId} ORDER BY V.viewed_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_member SET community_company_name = #{companyName}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE memberid = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT 'applied' AS "type", C.company_name || ' 지원' AS "title", C.company_name || ' - ' || JP.title AS "fullTitle", TO_CHAR(A.applied_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "date", C.company_name AS "company", A.fk_job_id AS "jobId", NULL AS "offerSubmitId" FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON A.fk_job_id = JP.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE A.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND A.application_status = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'deadline' AS "type", C.company_name || ' 마감' AS "title", C.company_name || ' - ' || JP.title AS "fullTitle", TO_CHAR(JP.deadline_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "date", C.company_name AS "company", A.fk_job_id AS "jobId", NULL AS "offerSubmitId" FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON A.fk_job_id = JP.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON JP.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid WHERE A.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND A.application_status = 0 AND JP.deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND JP.deadline_type != 'always'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'offer' AS "type", C.company_name || ' 응답기한' AS "title", C.company_name || ' - ' || S.title AS "fullTitle", TO_CHAR(S.expire_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "date", C.company_name AS "company", S.fk_job_id AS "jobId", S.offer_submit_id AS "offerSubmitId" FROM tbl_offer_response R JOIN tbl_offer_submit S ON S.offer_submit_id = R.fk_offer_submit_id JOIN tbl_job_posting JP ON JP.job_id = S.fk_job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON C.fk_memberid = JP.fk_memberid WHERE R.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND R.response_status = 0 AND S.expire_at IS NOT NULL
